content.en:
White Elephant City.

Ye Tian came to the shop of the White Dragon Clan, and he had traded here a few times before, so he was still a little familiar, so he naturally came here to trade again.

When the white dragon saw that Ye Tian was coming again, he asked curiously, "Endless Heavenly Ancestor, are you here to sell the Golden Muscle Serum again?"

"No, I don't have any Golden Muscle Fluid on me, I'm here to trade some other treasures this time!"

Ye Tian took out six primeval golden fruits.

When Bai Long saw the Ancient Golden Fruit, he was immediately a little surprised, "Ancient Golden Fruit, you have found such good things!"

"Found it in the primeval turtle sea!"

Ye Tian said casually.

"That's where it is!"

This white dragon also knew that many Blood Transformation Realm creatures had recently entered the Endless Turtle Sea, and their White Dragon Clan had also had many Blood Transformation Realm creatures in the past.

However, even if you want to find good things there, you need a certain amount of luck and strength, otherwise you may not find anything.

"The selling price of an Ancient Golden Fruit is 10,000 White Elephant Gold, but our store can only buy 9,800 White Elephant Gold!" Bai Long said.

In this regard, Ye Tian naturally felt that it was normal, after all, the White Dragon clan naturally had to make a little money when opening a store.

Subsequently, he took out several more treasures and traded them all to this shop.

The total value of these treasures is more than 100,000 white elephant gold.

And soon, the white dragon settled with Ye Tian.

"Do you want to accept this treasure?"

Ye Tian took out the fragments of the shell of the Seven Blood Transformation Realm Ancient Golden Turtles.

As soon as Bai Long saw this turtle shell fragment, he was immediately shocked: "This should be the turtle shell fragment of the Ancient Golden Turtle Clan's Seven-Stage Blood Transformation Realm, you even found such a good thing!"

"Receive?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Of course!" Bai Long immediately said: "However, I still have to discuss this specific price with the high-level of our White Dragon clan, and I can't give a specific price now." "

"Okay, I'll wait!"

Ye Tian was not in a hurry.

Soon, this white dragon contacted the top of the white dragon clan, after all, this transaction is not ordinary.

It didn't take long for a White Dragon Dragon Warrior from the Five Blood Transformation Realm to arrive at the store.

He took a closer look at the Ancient Golden Turtle Shell Fragment, "Yes, it is a Turtle Shell Fragment with activity, it should be a fragment that fell when the Ancient Golden Turtle of the Seventh Blood Transformation Realm was killed, and such a fragment is truly valuable." To be honest, if the primeval golden turtle clan was still strong, we wouldn't dare to buy it, but now there is no problem. According to its value, our White Dragon Clan is willing to pay 300,000 White Elephant Gold!"

300,000 white elephant gold!

Ye Tian thought about it carefully, this price is okay, it is definitely not low.

So, he agreed: "Okay, I agreed, I don't know if it can be changed to dragon gold blood?"

"Well, we don't have that much dragon gold blood!" Long Shu said, "The amount of dragon gold blood we can sell is limited, and you've bought a lot of it recently, so it's impossible to take out so much dragon gold blood in a short period of time." "

"How much dragon gold blood do you have?"

Ye Tian asked.

"100,000 drops of dragon gold blood is our limit. "

Long Shu confessed.

Subsequently, Ye Tian asked for 100,000 drops of dragon gold blood.

And it will take time for the White Dragon Clan to mobilize 100,000 drops of Dragon Gold Blood to come over, and it will take a long time for 100,000 drops of Dragon Gold Blood to be delivered to Ye Tian's hands.

After that, Ye Tian went to several other dragon races to buy dragon gold blood, and finally collected 300,000 drops of dragon gold blood.

However, even these 300,000 drops of dragon gold blood may not be able to help him complete the third transformation of his heart.

"Let's try it first!"

Ye Tian began to retreat, refining these dragon gold blood.

As a drop of Dripping Dragon Gold blood was consumed, Ye Tian's heart strengthened little by little.

Time flies, and after a long time, 300,000 drops of dragon gold blood are exhausted.

At this time, Ye Tian's heart had not yet completed its transformation.

"Sure enough, 300,000 drops of dragon gold blood are not enough!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He estimated that he still needed a lot of dragon gold blood, but he couldn't afford to buy dragon gold blood now.

"We have to take the Seven Blood Transformation Realm arm from the fragments of the Hidden River. Those Blood Transformation Realm in Wanlong's territorial sea have too little knowledge, and they have never been to White Elephant City at all, and they don't know that the arms of the Seven Blood Transformation Realm creatures will be very valuable. Otherwise, they would have informed the Blood Transformation Realm that had come out of the Ten Thousand Dragons Territorial Sea in the past, and maybe there would be four or five Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors who would have rushed back to take that arm!"

Ye Tian was not prepared to delay the time, so he went there immediately.

......

Fragments of the Dark River.

A replica body of Ye Tian came here directly from the Wanlong territorial waters, which saved the time of hurrying.

Soon, he was at the place where the arm was sealed.

Rumble!!!!

The layers of seals were easily broken by Ye Tian with one hand.

In the blink of an eye, all the seals were gone.

At this moment, the aura of that arm diffused and covered the entire fragment of the river.

When he hadn't broken through the Blood Transformation Realm at the beginning, he didn't have the strength to connect close to this arm, but now he could ignore this breath and directly put this arm away.

Then, he rushed to the White Elephant City.

At his speed, it would take a lot of time to get to White Elephant City from here.

Along the way, he also used other replica bodies to open the way, so as not to have an accident that caused this replica body to fall, and the loss would be too great.

Fortunately, it was very safe along the way, and there was only a little trouble.

this day.

Ye Tian's copy body arrived in the White Elephant City and found the shop of the White Dragon Clan again.

And the one who sits in this shop is still the white dragon.

"There's big business!"

Ye Tian opened his mouth and said.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, have you found something good again?" the white dragon was surprised.

"Let the five-time Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor come over last time, this time's business is even bigger than last time!"

As soon as Ye Tian said this, this white dragon immediately notified the white dragon who had changed the realm of five times to come over.

Not long after, the White Dragon Dragon who had changed the realm of blood five times came.

Long Shu saw Ye Tian and smiled, "Endless Heavenly Ancestor, what are you going to sell to our White Dragon Clan this time?"

"Open the formation, lest the breath leak!"

Ye Tian said.

Long Shu nodded and opened the formation, just to prevent the breath from leaking.

Rumble!!!

The arm of a seventh-time Blood Mutant creature appeared.

At this moment, the faces of Long Shu and the other white dragon changed, "The arm of the Seven Blood Transformation Realm creatures!"

Long Shu carefully identified it, sensed it, and finally determined whose arm this seven-stage blood transformation realm creature was?

"This is the arm of the Blood Demon Monkey of the Seven Blood Transformation Realm!"
